features.name: nested ternary chain with three-way mux
features.description: Code should include a nested ternary operator chain implementing a three-way mux select using multiple bit fields

features.name: handshake interface with valid data and ready signals
features.description: Code should include handshake interface signals with valid/data/ready protocol for multiple input channels
features.snippet:
input         in0_valid,
input  [63:0] in0_data,
input         in1_valid,
input  [63:0] in1_data,
input         in2_valid,
input  [63:0] in2_data,
output        in0_ready, in1_ready, in2_ready,

features.name: mux output data selection with nested ternary
features.description: Code should include a data output mux using nested ternary operator selecting between multiple data inputs based on select bits
